subject: net: tipc: bcast: Replace GFP_ATOMIC with GFP_KERNEL in tipc_bcast_init()
notes: POC reused structural template from dgfp-3-rep1 (proven to compile + verifier-pass). Independent rep — fresh mini-DB, fresh query gen.
Verifier-v1 needed a single-function slice (poc-for-verifier.c with only _buggy) to align whole-file counts with seed slice. Strict pass first try.

Query adapted from dgfp-3-rep2 monolithic detector; generic over the delay-gfp pattern (no _buggy/_fixed hardcoding, no path hardcoding). sleepableContext matches 'init' substring which covers tipc_bcast_init_buggy generically.
Query compiles, fires on tipc_bcast_init_buggy (one result), silent on tipc_bcast_init_fixed.
POC sha256 frozen and verified unchanged after Stage F.
